home.hero_subtitle: SafePulse is an AI-assisted platform dedicated to detecting scams, preventing radicalization, and building digital resilience across Southeast Asia.
home.features_title: A Public Health Approach to Digital Safety
home.features_subtitle: We treat online scams and radicalization the way epidemiologists treat disease — with early detection, community surveillance, and evidence-based interventions.
home.feat_realtime_desc: Analyse messages, URLs, phone numbers, and accounts instantly with our rule-based engine.
home.feat_dashboard_desc: Live incident maps and trend charts aggregating anonymous community reports.
home.feat_youth_desc: Curriculum-ready content helping young people recognise manipulation and build resilience.
home.feat_ngo_desc: Turnkey awareness campaign kits, data exports, and workshop facilitation guides.
home.feat_multi_desc: Available in 12 languages including Arabic, Japanese, Korean, Javanese script, and more.
home.feat_a11y_desc: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant with dark mode, font-size controls, and text-to-speech support.
home.cta_banner_subtitle: Explore our live public-health dashboard aggregating anonymous incident data.

seo_geo.badge: Digital Safety Platform · Anti-Scam · Southeast Asia
seo_geo.description: How keyword strategy, GEO entity-outcome thinking, and AI-assisted workflow are applied in a real anti-scam platform for vulnerable communities in Southeast Asia.
seo_geo.approach_desc: SafePulse needs content that humans can read, search engines can find, and AI language models can cite. All three layers are built simultaneously.
seo_geo.keyword_desc: Keyword cluster mapping based on search intent — from primary keywords to long-tail queries relevant for SEA audiences.
seo_geo.geo_desc: Entity–Outcome–Clarity framework so content can be cited by AI search engines like Perplexity, ChatGPT, and Google AI Overview.
seo_geo.genai_desc: AI accelerates ideation and drafting — humans hold editorial decisions, factual accuracy, and cultural sensitivity.
seo_geo.responsible_ai_subtitle: AI Used — Decisions Stay with Humans

products.title: Our Solutions
products.subtitle: Three platforms, one mission: a safer digital world for everyone.
products.scam_shield_desc: Real-time analysis of messages, URLs, phone numbers, and bank accounts to detect fraud before it causes harm.
products.youth_desc: Curriculum-aligned programs and digital tools that help young people recognise and resist online radicalization.
products.ngo_desc: Turnkey awareness campaigns, data dashboards, and community workshop materials for civil-society organizations.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.subtitle: Measurable change, like a public health intervention.

evidence.title: Evidence & Case Studies
evidence.subtitle: Our approach is grounded in peer-reviewed research and real-world outcomes.

insights.title: Insights & Threat Library
insights.subtitle: Timely articles, analysis, and educational content.
insights.no_results: No articles found matching your search.

checker.title: Scam & Risk Checker
checker.subtitle: Paste any suspicious content below. Our rule-based engine will analyse it instantly — no data is stored.

incident.title: Report an Incident
incident.subtitle: Reports are completely anonymous. Your data helps map threats and protect communities.
incident.success: Thank you — your report has been submitted anonymously.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Questions, partnerships, media enquiries — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.success: Thank you! We will get back to you within 2 business days.

dashboard.subtitle: Live aggregated data from anonymous incident reports.

footer.tagline: Building digital resilience for a safer Southeast Asia.
